---
title: "Statistical Data Analysis"
subtitle: "A practical course for particle physicists and astrophysicists"
author: "Dmitry V. Naumov"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: black
    width: 1024
    height: 768
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    chalkboard:
      buttons: false
    logo: img/dvnlogo.png
    css: styles.css
    transition: fade
    center: true
---
## 

# Lecture 1

## From fluctuations to likelihood

### Probability, counting, and statistical inference

---

## Roadmap

- Random variables and probability distributions
- Poisson and Gaussian laws
- Central limit theorem
- Likelihood and parameter estimation
- Confidence regions
